brand_identity.name: Alambana Healthcare
brand_identity.mission: To provide accessible, technology-driven, and reliable healthcare solutions to every individual.

container.default: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

buttons.primary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-primary/30 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 font-semibold hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: h-11 px-6 rounded-full text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-[#25D366] text-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.feature: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300 group
cards.doctor_profile: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

inputs.default: h-11 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all

badges.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.info: bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

hero_main.usage: Hero section main image, trust builder

consultation_scene.usage: About Us or Consultation Booking section

tech_abstract.usage: Backgrounds for tech-heavy sections or banners

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure text-to-background contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
accessibility_rules.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-primary/50)
accessibility_rules.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons and inputs

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts; use asymmetric grids for interest.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-8, p-12).
Never use pure black (#000000); use Slate-900 (#0F172A) instead.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md with bg-white/80 for sticky headers.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings; use 'Manrope'.
Ensure mobile responsiveness for all images (max-h-[80vh]).

instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn UI components but override styles to match the 'component_styles' defined here.
instructions_to_main_agent.pages: Create separate layouts for 'Marketing' (Landing, About) and 'App' (Dashboard, Doctor Panel).
instructions_to_main_agent.ai_integration: Mock the AI response for the Symptom Checker if backend is not ready, but build the UI to be fully functional.
instructions_to_main_agent.whatsapp: Implement the floating WhatsApp button globally in the layout.
